nasb.text: then he who hears the sound of the trumpet and does not take warning, and a sword comes and takes him away, his blood will be on his own head.

esv.text: then if anyone who hears the sound of the trumpet does not take warning, and the sword comes and takes him away, his blood shall be upon his own head.

cnv.text: 凡聽見號角聲而不接受警告的，刀劍若來把他除滅，他的罪就要歸到自己的頭上；

ccb.text: 凡听见号声而不接受警告的，敌人来把他杀了，这流血的罪就要由他自己承担。
